items.title: Emerge Career (YC S22) Is Hiring a Founding Growth Marketer
How an e-scooter founder raised $5 million to build space data centers
items.summary: Orbital founder Euwyn Poon built 250,000 scooters at Spin. Now he wants to launch 10,000 space data centers.

items.title: Inside Chicago’s Obama Center
items.summary: Italian art workers announce a nationwide strike, New York’s Penn Station to feature Trump’s name, and have you heard about the “Obamalisk”?

items.title: A First Look at the Art in the New Obama Presidential Center
items.summary: With works by Idris Khan, Maya Lin, and more, the $850M campus will be a public art destination for Chicago’s South Side, if it can live up to its community.
